title: Huawei OptiXstar EN8010Ts-20, XGS-PON ONT bridge
description: The Huawei OptiXstar EN8010Ts-20 is an XGS-PON bridging-type ONT in the Huawei all-optical access solution. It uses the XGS-PON technology to implement ultra-broadband access for users Auto-adaptive 10000Mbit/s, 5000Mbit/s, 2500Mbit/s, 1000Mbit/s, 100Mbit/s IGMP v2/v3 & MLD v1/v2 snooping Fast leave VLAN tag translation, transparent transmission, and removal for downstream multicast packets IGM/MLD protocol packet rate limitation Variable-length OMCI messages Rogue ONT detection and self-regulation PPPoE/DHCP simulation testing Device DC Power Adapter 12V / 1A
specsSearch: Optics Transmission speed 9,95 / 9,95 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1260 up to 1280 / 1575 up to 1580 Transfer type XGS-PON Polishing type APC Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 28 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SC LAN speed (1) 100M/1G/2.5G/5G/10G Power Max. power consumption [W] 6 Power via connector/terminal 12V / 1A
